headline: Duke Energy Clean Energy Program Exceeds Enrollment Targets in North Carolina
summary: Green Source Advantage Express (GSA Express), Duke Energy's newest clean energy program for large business customers in North Carolina, has surpassed initial enrollment targets, highlighting strong demand for flexible, streamlined access to renewable energy across the state.

headline: Southern Company's Stability Makes It a Wise Hold Right Now
summary: SO drives multi-year earnings with large load contracts and major investments, but interest costs, heavy reliance on data centers and high valuation pose risks.

headline: CEG Stock Underperforms Industry in the Past Week: How to Play?
summary: CEG stock slips after a chemical leak, but the nuclear fleet, Big Tech deals and Calpine acquisition position it to tap rising data center power demand.

headline: Duke Energy (DUK) to Raise $1B Through Convertible Senior Notes
summary: Duke Energy Corp. (NYSE:DUK) is one of the 10 best regulated electric stocks to buy according to hedge funds. On March 9, Duke Energy Corp. (NYSE:DUK) revealed its plans to issue an aggregate principal amount of convertible senior notes due 2029 worth $1 billion. The issue will be conducted through a private placement under the […]
